name: KrillApp.Trigger.LowThreshold
title: Low Threshold
description: Triggers an alarm and executes child nodes when the parent DataPoint's value falls at or below a configured threshold. Compares the DataPoint snapshot value against the threshold: fires when value <= threshold. Sets node state to WARN on breach.
shortDescription: Triggers when a DataPoint value falls at or below a configured lower limit.
llmPurpose: Evaluates whether a DataPoint value is at or below a threshold and triggers child execution and alarm state when breached.
llmBehavior: sets node state to WARN on breach
llmOutputs: executes child nodes when threshold is breached
llmCreationHints: Create a LowThreshold when the user wants to be alerted or trigger actions when a value falls below a minimum. Requires a numeric threshold value.

llmConnectionHints.role: conditional trigger that fires when DataPoint value is at or below threshold

llmExamples: Alert me when the temperature drops below 32 degrees.
Trigger a webhook when the water level is below 10.
Warn me when battery drops to 20%.
